description: WaniKani API Key Setup Wizard - Guided first-launch experience that walks new users through generating a WaniKani API token, entering it, syncing data, and configuring notifications

userStories.title: Swipable Carousel Component
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a reusable swipable page/carousel component for the wizard instruction step.
acceptanceCriteria: Build a reusable SwipableCarousel component using React Native ScrollView with pagingEnabled and horizontal
Component accepts an array of page content (ReactNode[]) and renders them as swipable pages
Includes page indicator dots (filled for current page, outline for others)
Supports onPageChange callback for tracking the current page index
Works on both iOS and Android
No new native dependencies required
All tests pass
All quality checks pass

userStories.title: Capture WaniKani Screenshots for Instructions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need actual screenshots of the WaniKani token generation flow to use in the wizard instruction pages.
acceptanceCriteria: Use Playwright with Chrome to navigate https://www.wanikani.com/settings/personal_access_tokens using the unainikani-test test user
Capture screenshots for each instruction step: settings page, personal access tokens section, generate button, copy token
Screenshots are cropped/annotated to highlight the relevant UI area
Screenshots captured at 2x resolution (750px wide) for clarity across screen sizes
Screenshots are saved as assets in assets/wizard/
All quality checks pass

userStories.title: Welcome Screen
userStories.description: As a new user, I want to see a branded welcome screen so that I know I'm in the right app and feel invited to start.
acceptanceCriteria: Create a WelcomeScreen component in src/screens/
Display the Cabrigator logo (240x240) using existing assets/cabrigator-icon.png
Show the app name 'Krabikani'
Show the tagline 'Master Japanese, one review at a time'
Display a 'Get Started' button styled with vocabulary purple (#AA00FF)
Supports light and dark mode using the existing theme system (useTheme, COLORS, SPACING, FONT_SIZES)
Add WelcomeScreen to RootStackParamList in src/navigation/types.ts
Register WelcomeScreen in RootNavigator.tsx
All tests pass
All quality checks pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Swipable API Key Instructions Screen
userStories.description: As a new user, I want step-by-step visual instructions on how to generate a WaniKani API token, so that I can set up the app without guessing.
acceptanceCriteria: Create an InstructionsScreen using the SwipableCarousel component from US-001

4 swipable pages: (1) 'Go to your WaniKani Settings' with screenshot, (2) 'Click on Personal Access Tokens' with screenshot, (3) 'Generate a new token' with screenshot, (4) 'Copy your new token' with screenshot + 'Open WaniKani Settings' button linking to https://www.wanikani.com/settings/personal_access_tokens
Each page shows a screenshot in a rounded-corner card with subtle border (works in light and dark mode)
Page indicator dots show current position
User can swipe left/right between pages
'Next' button on each page and 'Back' on pages after the first
Final page has a 'Continue' button to advance to the API key input step
Supports light and dark mode
Add InstructionsScreen to navigation types and RootNavigator
All tests pass
All quality checks pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Depends on US-001 (carousel component) and US-002 (screenshots)

userStories.title: API Key Input Screen
userStories.description: As a new user, I want to paste my WaniKani API token so that the app can connect to my account.
acceptanceCriteria: Create an ApiKeyInputScreen in src/screens/
Text input field for the API key (secure text entry)
'Validate & Connect' button to submit
Back navigation to return to the instructions
Loading state while validating the key (call GET /user with the entered token; 200 = valid, 401 = invalid)
On invalid key: show inline error 'Invalid API key. Please check your token and try again.' — stay on this step
On network error: show inline error 'Could not connect to WaniKani. Please check your internet connection and try again.' — stay on this step
On success: save key to secure storage via saveApiKey() and navigate to sync step
Supports light and dark mode
Add ApiKeyInputScreen to navigation types and RootNavigator
All tests pass
All quality checks pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Sync Step Screen
userStories.description: As a new user, I want the app to sync my WaniKani data after connecting, so that I can start using it immediately.
acceptanceCriteria: Create a SyncScreen in src/screens/
Show a progress/loading indicator during sync
Display status text 'Syncing your data...'
Trigger sync using existing patterns: getUserLevel(), syncSubjects(), syncAssignments() in parallel
On success: automatically advance to the notification permission step
On failure: show error with 'Retry' button — stay on this step
No back navigation from this step (key is already saved)
Add SyncScreen to navigation types and RootNavigator
All tests pass
All quality checks pass

userStories.title: Notification Permission Step
userStories.description: As a new user, I want to optionally enable notifications so that I get reminded about upcoming reviews.
acceptanceCriteria: Create a WizardNotificationScreen that reuses existing NotificationPermissionScreen component/logic
Two options: 'Enable Notifications' (primary) and 'Maybe Later' (secondary)
On either choice: advance to the completion step
Add to navigation types and RootNavigator
All tests pass
All quality checks pass

userStories.title: Completion Step Screen
userStories.description: As a new user, I want to see a confirmation that setup is complete so I know I can start learning.
acceptanceCriteria: Create a WizardCompletionScreen in src/screens/
Show the Cabrigator logo
Display a 'You're all set!' message
'Start Learning' button that navigates to Home with navigation.reset() to clear stack
User cannot navigate back to wizard after pressing Start Learning
Supports light and dark mode
Add to navigation types and RootNavigator
All tests pass
All quality checks pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Auto-launch Wizard on First Use
userStories.description: As a new user, I want the app to automatically guide me through setup when I open it for the first time, so that I don't have to figure out where to configure things.
acceptanceCriteria: In RootNavigator.tsx, check hasApiKey() during initialization to determine initial route
If no API key is stored, navigate to WelcomeScreen instead of Home
The wizard is the root of the navigation stack (no back to Home)
If an API key is already stored, launch normally to Home
All tests pass
All quality checks pass
userStories.notes: Depends on all wizard screens being registered (US-003 through US-008)

userStories.title: Re-trigger Wizard on API Key Clear
userStories.description: As an existing user, when I clear my API key from Settings, I want the wizard to appear again so that I can reconfigure the app.
acceptanceCriteria: After confirming 'Clear API Key' in Settings, navigate to the wizard with navigation.reset() to replace stack
The existing clearApiKey() and clearAllData() calls remain unchanged
Wizard behaves identically to first-launch (all steps available)
All tests pass
All quality checks pass
